mapper.insert:
insert into shebao_payment_plan_summary (plan_id, business_period, subsidy_type, grant_org, total_count, total_amount, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values
(#{item.planId}, #{item.businessPeriod}, #{item.subsidyType}, #{item.grantOrg}, #{item.totalCount}, #{item.totalAmount}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select: select s.id, s.plan_id, date_format(s.business_period, '%Y-%m') as business_period, s.subsidy_type, s.grant_org, s.total_count, s.total_amount from shebao_payment_plan_summary s where s.plan_id = #{planId} and s.del_flag = '0' order by s.subsidy_type asc, s.grant_org asc, s.id asc
